focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:

【世界新闻】Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests

items.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
items.summary: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

items.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
items.summary: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

items.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to cr

items.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
items.summary: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

items.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
items.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

items.title: 又一万亿级蓝海！就在你家门口→
items.summary: 2元至3元的特价菜

items.title: 2026年《财富》中国500强排行榜：国家电网、中石油和中石化位列前三
items.summary: 中新社北京7月21日电 (记者 阮煜琳)21日揭晓的2026年《财富》中国500强排行榜显示，国家电网有限公司以5553.7亿美元的营收位居榜首，中国石油和中国石化分列榜单第二位和第三位。

items.title: 今年一季度欧元区和欧盟政府债务水平双双走高
items.summary: 中新社布鲁塞尔7月21日电 (记者 德永健)欧盟统计局21日公布的数据显示，今年一季度欧元区政府债务占国内生产总值(GDP)的比例为88.9%，欧盟政府债务占国内生产总值的比例为82.9%，较2025年四季度双双走高。

items.title: 美防长称伊朗战争已耗费约375亿美元
items.summary: 中新社华盛顿7月21日电 (记者 沙晗汀)美国国防部长赫格塞思当地时间21日出席国会听证会时表示，美国对伊朗军事行动迄今估计已耗费约375亿美元。

items.title: 荷兰宣布今年9月下旬正式禁止进口以色列非法定居点产品
items.summary: 中新社海牙7月21日电 荷兰政府21日宣布，今年9月22日起，将正式禁止进口以色列非法定居点产品。

items.title: 法国议会通过法案禁止15岁以下未成年人使用社交媒体
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月21日电 (记者 李洋)法国议会当地时间21日正式通过法案，禁止15岁以下未成年人使用社交媒体。

items.title: 英国首相伯纳姆召开内阁首次会议：纾解民众生活成本
items.summary: 中新社伦敦7月21日电 (记者 欧阳开宇)英国新任首相安迪·伯纳姆21日主持召开履职后首次内阁会议，会上明确将本届政府定位为“专注缓解生活成本压力的政府”，要求各部门全面出台举措减轻家庭经济负担，纾解民众生活成本。

items.title: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.summary: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after backlash over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

items.title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
items.summary: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.

items.title: Carney looking at 'all options' as Trump announces 50% tariffs on Canada
items.summary: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

items.title: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
items.summary: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
items.summary: Iran says it has hit two ships in the Strait of Hormuz as well as targets in Bahrain and Jordan.
